{% if is_disciplinary %}

You are hereby notified that your employment has been terminated following the conclusion of the disciplinary process linked to {{ doc.linked_intervention }}.

Having considered the evidence, the applicable disciplinary code, the seriousness of the misconduct, and the relevant circumstances, dismissal has been imposed as the outcome of the process.

{% elif is_incapacity %}

You are hereby notified that your employment has been terminated following the conclusion of the incapacity process linked to {{ doc.linked_intervention }}.

The decision follows consideration of the nature and extent of the incapacity, the operational requirements of the position, and the reasonable alternatives considered during the process.

{% elif is_performance %}

You are hereby notified that your employment has been terminated following the conclusion of the poor-performance process linked to {{ doc.linked_intervention }}.

The decision follows the performance-management process, including the performance concerns raised, the opportunity afforded to improve, and the relevant circumstances considered during the process.

{% else %}

You are hereby notified that your employment has been terminated with effect from {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.outcome_date) }} .

{% endif %}

Your final date of employment is {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.outcome_date) }} .
